calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-011 second source validation: harm_history input resolves D3 reversal
items.notes: 2-condition ablation (WITH_HISTORY vs WITHOUT_HISTORY), 3 seeds. Tests that harm_history_len=10 resolves the D3 reversal (r2_a > r2_s) seen in EXQ-241. Phased: P0=100ep training, P1=50ep eval.

items.title: SD-020: z_harm_a surprise PE training vs raw accumulation
items.notes: 3-condition (RAW_ACCUM, SURPRISE_PE, COMBINED) x 3 seeds. Tests Chen 2023 claim: AIC encodes PE not raw state. Fix: grid_size -> size in env constructor.

items.title: SD-021: descending pain modulation during commitment
items.notes: 2-condition (NO_DESCENDING, WITH_DESCENDING) x 3 seeds. Commitment-gated z_harm_s attenuation (alpha=0.3). Fix: grid_size -> size in env constructor.
